name: Aceh (Indonesia)
description: A red field bounded above and below by narrow black-and-white horizontal stripes, with a white crescent moon and star at the hoist.
history: Adopted by the Aceh Provincial People's Representative Council on 22 March 2013 (Qanun No. 3/2013) as the official flag of the Special Region of Aceh. The Indonesian central government has objected on the grounds that the design replicates the flag of the former separatist Free Aceh Movement (GAM, 1976 to 2005); a final negotiated status remains unresolved.

features.symbolism: Islam, the dominant religion of Aceh
